owner_operator_stated: Dr. Dennis B. Hartlieb is named President of the LTD entity (per business-registry source) and is a lead dentist at Chicago Beautiful Smiles alongside Dr. Christopher Ching.
notes: Legal entity 'Mopper, Hartlieb & Associates Ltd' operates under the consumer brand 'Chicago Beautiful Smiles' at the exact record address (2601 Compass Rd Ste 100, Glenview IL 60026) — corroborated by address match. Site's listed phone (847) 729-6080 differs from the record's (847) 729-4840; address match alone satisfies corroboration. Founding co-owner Dr. K. William Mopper no longer appears on the current site roster (Hartlieb, Ching, Lemieux). No dedicated careers page found. No multi-location/DSO affiliation found — appears to be a single-location practice.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Mohammad Al-Asadi, DDS, FAGD is listed among the practice's dentists; external sources describe him as the dentist who acquired the Highland Park practice at this address in 2006, matching the record entity 'M. Al Asadi DDS PC.'
notes: Site operates under DBA 'Smile Group of Highland Park' at the exact record address and phone (806 Central Ave Ste 201, Highland Park IL 60035, (847) 432-4131 — both match exactly). Dr. Al-Asadi (record entity name) is listed among 4 practicing dentists alongside Schwab, Amiran, and Fisher — a multi-dentist group practice, not a solo Al-Asadi office. A 'Job Opportunities' page exists but showed no specific current openings at check time (generic 'always hiring' language only).

public_practice_name: Drs. Mellovitz & Grumet Dental Associates, L.L.C. (Keith Mellovitz, DDS)
owner_operator_stated: The site's staff page explicitly states the practice operates as 'Drs. Mellovitz & Grumet Dental Associates, L.L.C.' with Dr. Keith Mellovitz as owner/founder (36+ years) and Dr. Joshua Grumet as associate — a direct legal-entity-name match to the record.
notes: Strong corroboration: the site's own staff page names the exact legal entity 'Drs. Mellovitz & Grumet Dental Associates, L.L.C.' Address matches record (1893 Sheridan Rd = '1893 Sheridan Road, Suite 318'). Site phone (847) 433-9350 differs from record's (847) 432-0860; legal-entity-name plus address match is sufficient corroboration regardless. No careers/hiring page found on the site.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Sam Skurie is identified as the practice's owner/principal dentist, matching the record entity 'Samuel Skurie, D.D.S., LTD.'
notes: Corroborated by name plus address match: skuriedental.com lists '1770 First Street, Suite 450, Highland Park, IL 60035', matching record's '1770 1st St' (same building). Site phone (847) 432-0254 differs from record's (847) 579-4777. The vendor_website_hint (Brianweinbergdental.com) belongs to a DIFFERENT, unrelated dentist (Brian M. Weinberg, D.M.D., Ltd.) in the SAME multi-suite office building at 1770 1st St (Suite 410, phone (847) 432-5520) — a false lead from building-level geocoding, not a successor situation; Skurie's own practice is live and independently verified under its own name/site. Record's provider_count of 8 could not be corroborated — only Dr. Skurie appears on the site (no associates/hygienists named).

owner_operator_stated: Drs. Laniel Razdolsky and Monika Tincher purchased and jointly own the practice (since October 2015), matching the record entity 'Lake Forest Dental Associates, PC.'
notes: Address (133 E Laurel Ave, Lake Forest, IL 60045) and phone ((847) 234-6440) both match the record exactly, per search-engine-indexed content of the site's own pages. Direct WebFetch of lakeforestdentalassociates.com returned HTTP 403 (bot-blocked) — doctor/ownership info sourced from indexed snippets of the site's /our-story/ page plus a corroborating Tebra provider profile, not a direct page load. No careers page found.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Peter J. Galdoni, DDS is named President/owner and has practiced at this location for 34 years, matching the record entity 'Morton Grove Dental Associates.'
notes: Address and phone both match record exactly (9133 Waukegan Rd, Morton Grove IL 60053, (847) 470-0001). Homepage names Dr. Galdoni ('Dr. Pete') in testimonials; a search-indexed snippet of the site's own /about/ (staff) page names three dentists: Dr. Peter J. Galdoni (President), Dr. Kara, and Dr. Charlotte Salameh. Some third-party listings describe the practice as having 2 dentists (established 1991), while 3 are named on-site currently; no careers/hiring page found.
